title: relay: PoW replay DashMap grows unbounded under flood
description: relay/src/ws.rs:288-309: the PoW replay set uses lazy eviction (`retain`) on every authenticate call but has no size cap. An attacker sending millions of unique valid PoW tokens within the 600 s staleness window will grow the DashMap without bound, eventually causing OOM. Fix: after the retain, check `pow_replay_set.len() > MAX_REPLAY_ENTRIES` (e.g. 1_000_000) and reject new tokens with POW_REPLAYED or a dedicated error. A DashMap with 1 M small entries fits in ~100 MB; above that something is wrong.
